title: First Trust Balanced Income ETF declares $0.1276 dividend
content:
* First Trust Balanced Income ETF (FTBI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTBI]) declares $0.1276/share monthly dividend.
 	* Payable Nov. 28; for shareholders of record Nov. 21; ex-div Nov. 21.
 	* See FTBI Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTBI/dividends?source=news_bullet]

title: First Trust Balanced Income ETF declares $0.1181 dividend
content:
* First Trust Balanced Income ETF (NYSEARCA:FTBI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTBI]) declared $0.1181/share monthly dividend [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20148301-first-trust-advisors-l-p-announces-distributions-for-exchange-traded-funds].
 	* Payable June 30; for shareholders of record June 26; ex-div June 26.
 	* See FTBI Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTBI/dividends?source=news_bullet]

title: First Trust Balanced Income ETF launched
content:
Exchange-traded funds provider and asset manager First Trust Advisors announced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20120131-first-trust-launches-a-balanced-income-etf] on Thursday the launch of the First Trust Balanced Income ETF (NYSEARCA:FTBI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTBI]).

FTBI tracks the Bloomberg Moderate Allocation Income Focus Index, which is reconstituted and rebalanced semi-annually.
